name: ffi_libcall_emit
notes: FFI effect EMISSION beyond Println/Exit: state=FStart => effects=[LibCall("libc","abs","i(i)",[ArgInt(-7)])]. The contract unit is the emitted effect list (what the dispatcher would run); the actual libffi C call is dispatch, NOT part of the transition relation — so this fixture is fully deterministic and engine-neutral. The Effect datatype carries the LibCall variant with a (Seq FFIArg) payload field (FFIArg declared as its own ADT). Both SMT engines decode the nested Seq(FFIArg) generically. Doubly-witnessed: CurrentRuntime probe (external claim sat_emits_libcall) + SmtLib Method A/B.
